key.name: refresh-rate
key.description: How often to check the public IP address. Minimum 30 seconds to avoid API abuse.

key.name: compact-mode
key.description: Hide the IP address text from the panel and only show the country flag icon.

key.name: position-in-panel
key.description: Where to place the indicator in the GNOME Shell panel.

key.name: show-map
key.description: Show a map tile in the popup menu. When enabled, fetches a tile from OpenStreetMap which reveals approximate location to a third party.

key.name: show-cidr-prefix
key.description: Show the network prefix (e.g. /24) next to each IP address. Fetches data from RIPE NCC (stat.ripe.net), which sends your IP to a third party.

key.name: hidden-interfaces
key.description: List of network interface names to hide from the local IPs section.

key.name: notify-ip-change
key.description: Show a desktop notification when the public IP address changes. Includes VPN status and leak warnings.
